comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: Flipping the canonical justification — from 'reuse earns the plumbing' to 'designing the grammar IS the abstraction work' — is the reframe the essay earns. Most writers treat DSLs as investments; this treats them as thinking tools.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: 'The grammar won't let you' is the diagnostic moment. Writing a DSL that you refuse to publish is still valuable — the failed design told you where your understanding was soft.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: The fifteen-minutes-in observation matches the rhythm of the move. The value isn't at the end of the exercise — it's mid-exercise, when the questions that don't have good answers become visible.
